title: Discard button is present and visible in workspace header
description: The 'Discard' button is visible in the workspace header alongside 'Open In' and 'Merge'. Not clicked per instructions (destructive action).

title: Discard button may navigate away instead of showing confirmation (unverified)
description: Based on the pattern observed with the Merge button (F-034-001) where clicking navigates away from the workspace, the Discard button may exhibit the same behavior. A destructive action without confirmation is a high-risk UX issue if confirmed.
expected: Clicking Discard should show a confirmation dialog before proceeding
actual: Not tested (destructive action), but risk flagged based on Merge button behavior
